The Complete Driveway
Gate Guide Hub

Everything you need to know before buying, installing, or maintaining a driveway gate in London — written by people who install them every day.

Pricing

The True Cost of Electric Driveway Gates in London (2026 Guide)

A full breakdown of what electric driveway gates cost in London in 2026 — from basic timber swing gates to fully automated aluminium sliding systems — including installation, automation, and hidden London costs.

9 minRead
Pricing

How Much Electricity Does an Automated Gate Actually Use?

Electric gate running costs are far lower than most homeowners expect — but the full annual picture includes electricity, servicing, and occasional repairs. Here is what you will actually pay.

7 minRead
Pricing

The Cost of Adding Automation to Existing Driveway Gates

Already have manual gates and want to add motors? Here is a clear breakdown of gate automation kit installation prices in London — covering underground motors, ram-arm systems, and the site requirements that affect the final cost.

6 minRead
Buying

Aluminium vs. Wooden Driveway Gates: Which is Best for Your London Home?

Timber looks warmer. Aluminium lasts longer with zero maintenance. This guide gives you the full, honest comparison of aluminium vs wooden driveway gates so you can make the right call for your London property.

8 minRead
Buying

Swing vs. Sliding Gates: The Ultimate Buyer's Guide

Swing gate or sliding gate? The answer depends on your driveway length, slope, available wall space, and budget. This guide covers every practical variable so you can make the right decision for your London property.

8 minRead
Buying

The Best Intercom Systems for Electric Driveway Gates

Video, audio, GSM, or keypad — there are more intercom options than ever for London driveway gates. This guide compares the main systems so you can choose the right access control for your property and lifestyle.

8 minRead
Maintenance

Why Your Electric Gate is Humming But Not Moving (And How to Fix It)

An electric gate motor that hums but will not move is one of the most common gate failures in London. Here are the three most likely causes — and how to tell whether it is something you can fix yourself or a job for an engineer.

6 minRead
Maintenance

How to Manually Open an Electric Gate During a Power Cut

Power cut or motor failure — every automated gate has a manual release. This step-by-step guide covers how to find and use it for both swing gates and sliding gates, and what to do if it will not operate.

5 minRead
Maintenance

The Ultimate Winter Maintenance Guide for Electric Gates

London winters are damp and cold — and that combination is hard on gate motors, tracks, hinges, and timber finishes. This maintenance checklist covers what to do before the cold hits and what to watch for during it.

7 minRead
Safety

UK Electric Gate Safety Laws: What London Homeowners Need to Know

Automated gates are classified as machinery under UK law. That means they come with legal obligations for installers, and ongoing responsibilities for homeowners. This guide explains the UK electric gate safety laws in plain English.

9 minRead
Safety

Electric Gate Force Testing: What It Is and Why It's the Law

Force testing is a legal requirement for every automated gate installation in the UK. If your installer did not do it, your gate is not legally compliant. Here is what the test involves and why it matters.

6 minRead
Safety

Gate Safety Hardware Explained: Photocells, Edges, and Loops

Photocells, safety edges, and ground loops are the three main electric gate safety devices — but they work differently and protect against different risks. Understanding what each one does helps you check whether your installation is adequately protected.

7 minRead
Ready?

Ready to Get Quotes?

When you are ready, we match you with vetted London installers — free and no obligation.

DRIVEWAYGATES.LONDON

Independent matching service connecting London homeowners and businesses with vetted, experienced gate installers across every borough.

We are a referral service. We connect you with independent gate installers. We do not carry out installations ourselves.
